overall.description: A smooth first-person walk through a sunlit residential courtyard in a high-fidelity video game, likely Red Dead Redemption 2. The camera moves from behind a wrought iron fence toward a central three-tier fountain and outdoor seating area, surrounded by Victorian-style wooden houses and lush garden vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential garden courtyard with central fountain

events.description: passes the foreground wrought iron fence into the open garden area

agents.ego_description: moving steadily through the garden courtyard toward the central fountain and house beyond

entered.detail: black metal fence in the immediate foreground, partially obscuring the view of the garden
blue stone three-tiered water fountain situated in the middle of the lawn
two-story dark wooden house with exterior staircase and balcony
tall stone wall running along the right side of the property
white wicker chairs and table with large umbrella near the house
tall palm tree visible above the left side buildings
cobblestone path running along the left side of the garden

segments.scene_description: Beginning behind a wrought iron fence, the camera moves forward into a sunlit residential courtyard. A three-tier fountain stands in the center of the garden, with Victorian wooden houses visible in the background and a stone pathway running along the left side.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching central fountain in residential garden

events.description: camera moves past the fountain, shifting trajectory slightly toward the patio furniture

agents.ego_description: continuing through the garden, passing the central fountain on the approach to the house patio

entered.detail: wooden exterior staircase attached to the side of the house

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the garden past the foreground fence, the camera approaches the central fountain. The outdoor patio furniture becomes more prominent ahead, positioned near the house exterior, while the exterior staircase on the house becomes visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: patio area adjacent to house exterior

agents.ego_description: approaching the outdoor seating area near the house wall, examining the patio furniture

segments.scene_description: Passing the fountain on the right, the camera approaches the outdoor seating area. The patio furniture with its umbrella becomes the focal point as the camera nears the house wall, with the exterior staircase now prominent on the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement from the perimeter of a sunlit residential courtyard toward an intimate outdoor living space. It begins behind a wrought iron fence, gliding into the garden where a three-tier fountain stands centered against a backdrop of Victorian wooden houses and a stone pathway. As the camera moves deeper into the garden, the foreground fence recedes and the central fountain draws closer, revealing an outdoor patio and an exterior staircase on the house. The scene then shifts focus as the camera passes the fountain on the right, narrowing its path toward the house wall. Finally, the movement culminates at the outdoor seating area, where the patio furniture and its umbrella become the primary focal point beside the prominent wooden staircase.
